title: Vectra AI Intel
description: The OpenCTI Vectra AI Intelligence connector synchronises indicators of compromise (IOCs) from OpenCTI to the Vectra AI Platform in real time. Leveraging OpenCTI live streams, it maintains a Vectra threat feed of IP addresses, domains and URLs so that network detections (Threat Intel Match) fire on the threat intelligence curated in OpenCTI.
short_description: Push IOCs (IP addresses, domains and URLs) from OpenCTI to a Vectra AI threat feed in real time.
